'''Ninopas Orocc''' was a [[Gran/Legends|Gran]] [[Gambling/Legends|gambling]] addict. In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], Orocc attended the [[Boonta Eve Classic/Legends|Boonta Eve Classic]] [[Podracing/Legends|podrace]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] to place various wagers.<ref name="Rogues Gallery Star Wars Insider">{{InsiderCite|131|Rogues Gallery|Rogues Gallery: An Audience of Aliens}}</ref> Orocc was affiliated with [[Botlat Rej]], and became a fugitive sought by the [[Coruscant Security Force/Legends|Coruscant Security Force]] for disrupting a [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] briefing by smearing [[Cornesian Wax]] on the base of several hover platforms, injuring three [[Senator/Legends|senators]]. He had a bounty worth 2,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|Republic credits]] alive and 1,000 dead. He was last seen by the police at [[Anchorhead/Legends|Anchorhead]] before arriving at [[Outland Transit Station]] (where he became a hired gun for [[Meeko Ghintee]]) and being captured by [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] for 2,000 credits.

==Behind the scenes==
Ninopas Orocc is the fourth secondary bounty to be encounter during the second level of Chapter Two in ''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]''. It is up to the player to take him alive or dead.
